ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cohort */,
  "cohort_name" TEXT /* Name of the cohort */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the cohort study began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the cohort study ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cohort */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the cohort */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the cohort */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the cohort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "hh_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the household belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the household */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the household */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the household */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the household */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the household */,
  "household_head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household head */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the household */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hh_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "hh_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the individual belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual (M/F) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "relationship_to_head" TEXT /* Relationship to the household head */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_hh_id FOREIGN KEY ("hh_id") REFERENCES households ("hh_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_status" (
  "health_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health status record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the health status belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the individual in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the individual in kg */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the individual */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the individual (Yes/No) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the individual (Yes/No) */,
  "diabetes_status" TEXT /* Diabetes status of the individual (Yes/No) */,
  "heart_disease_status" TEXT /* Heart disease status of the individual (Yes/No) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* BMI of the individual */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the individual */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_status_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the medical history belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received */,
  "ongoing" TEXT /* Ongoing status (Yes/No) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the condition */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Healthcare provider who diagnosed the condition */,
  "follow_up_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of follow-up visits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_factors" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the lifestyle factors belong to */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet type (e.g., Vegan, Omnivore) */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of exercise (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "sleep_hours" INTEGER /* Average hours of sleep per night */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Stress level (Low, Medium, High) */,
  "social_activity" TEXT /* Frequency of social activities (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "smoking_history" TEXT /* Smoking history (e.g., Never, Former, Current) */,
  "dietary_restrictions" TEXT /* Dietary restrictions (e.g., Gluten-free, Lactose-free) */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Physical activity level (e.g., Sedentary, Moderate, Active) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_factors_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "question_number" INTEGER /* Number of the question in the survey */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Variable name used in the survey */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of the variable (e.g., Numeric, Date) */,
  "variable_codes" TEXT /* Codes for the variable (e.g., 1-Male, 2-Female) */,
  "accepted_values" TEXT /* Accepted values for the variable */,
  "skip_logic" TEXT /* Skip logic for the question */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., Demographic, Health, Lifestyle) */,
  "required_status" TEXT /* Required status of the question (e.g., Required, Optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the response belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was recorded */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the response (e.g., Valid, Invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the record belongs to */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the record */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the record */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the data belongs to */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file uploaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file the quality metrics belong to */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Overall data quality score (0-100) */,
  "missing_values" INTEGER /* Number of missing values in the dataset */,
  "outliers" INTEGER /* Number of outliers in the dataset */,
  "inconsistencies" INTEGER /* Number of inconsistencies in the dataset */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments */,
  "quality_check_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality check */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)
